---
title: "Elizabeth Jane Keble"
---

## Elizabeth Jane Keble

**Dates:** (1804-1870)

**Maiden name:** (Clarke)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Thomas Keble, sr. sister of Charlotte Keble

### Letters

- Letter from [1 October 1870]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1870?[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Dec 6th [1866]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1866?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from April 4th [1866]
- Letter from March 29, 1866.
- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]
- Letter from 8th Aug. 1860.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
